name: ranking-baseline
description: Synthetic 18-asset stash covering skills, commands, agents, and knowledge across docker, k8s, svelte, and code-review domains.
purpose: Baseline fixture for tests/ranking-regression.test.ts. Migrated from tests/ranking-fixtures/stash/ in issue #235. #39: the three bare scripts (mem0-search, deploy-check, docker-clean) were re-homed as knowledge/*.md when the .stash.json sidecar readers were retired — knowledge, like script, gets no type boost, so ranking mechanics are preserved. Names are unchanged.
